steps.title: Use the perimeter
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the third side. The perimeter is the sum of all three sides:

$$8+11+x=34$$
$$19+x=34$$
$$x=15$$

steps.title: Check the triangle type
steps.content:
With sides $8$, $11$, and $15$, the longest side is $15$. The obtuse check is

$$8^2+11^2<15^2$$
$$64+121<225$$
$$185<225$$

So the side length fits the condition. The answer is A.
